generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians talk about cutting defense budgets to fund domestic programs, but that's a dangerous trade-off. Our allies rely on us for deterrence, and weakening our commitments could embolden adversaries. We can't afford to gamble with our security. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
